eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Idaho; Malheur, OR; Lincoln, MT; Spokane, WA; at 10:41 AM on JUN 30, 2019 Effective until 12:41 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an activation of the amber alert system.  This is the Idaho State Communications Center. We have just received this important information regarding a child abducted in Elmore County. The Elmore County Sheriff is looking for a child who was last seen at 1010 East Jackson Street, Mountain Home Idaho at 2 20 this morning and is believed to be in danger. The childs name is Bertonia Mcfadden. She is a 16 year old female with brown hair and brown eyes and was last seen wearing black jeans and a pink shirt. She is 5 feet tall and weighs 140 pounds. She is developmentally delayed and requires the occasional use of a wheelchair. She wears a leg brace on her left side from the knee down with purple skulls on it. Authorities say that the child may be in the company of Erick Javier Anaya, 24 year old male. He is 6 feet tall and weighs 175 pounds, He has brown hair and brown eyes. They may be traveling in a silver 2004 Ford Explorer. If you have any information on the where abouts of this child, please contact the Elmore County Sheriff at 208-587-2100 immediately.
